advantages: Catch wiring, contract and integration bugs that unit tests structurally cannot.
Verify schema migrations, ORM mappings, and serialization round-trips against the real system.
Detect upstream API changes the moment cassettes are re-recorded or smoke tests run.
Provide confidence to refactor across module boundaries.
Bridge the realism gap to E2E tests without their full cost.
disadvantages: Slower than unit tests — full integration suite is seconds-to-minutes.
More flaky — networks, containers, shared state all introduce variability.
More setup — Docker, testcontainers, cassettes, ephemeral envs.
Cost: cloud resources, LLM tokens for smoke tests.
Harder to debug failures — multiple layers can be at fault.
